role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of visible text and remained neutral.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, soil, and settlement patterns.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed vegetation types (steppe, deciduous trees) and biome.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed utility poles, road surfaces, and infrastructure.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized architectural and infrastructural cues to distinguish regions.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified Turkey as the ground truth. The agents adhered strictly to their domains, providing consistent evidence (mud-brick walls, utility poles, steppe vegetation) that converged on the correct answer. The meta agent played a crucial role in distinguishing the specific infrastructure style.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of mud-brick walls and red roofs match the image perfectly.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Descriptions of steppe grass and deciduous trees match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Descriptions of concrete utility poles and road types match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Synthesis of architectural cues is visually grounded.
